targets.rawSql: SELECT a.month AS time, a.metric_key, CASE WHEN s.direction = 'higher_is_better' THEN (a.actual_value - s.monthly_target) ELSE (s.monthly_target - a.actual_value) END AS value FROM kpi_monthly_actuals a JOIN kpi_owner_scoreboard_current s ON a.metric_key = s.metric_key WHERE a.metric_key IN ('stockout_rate_pct','master_data_validation_pass_pct','insight_adoption_rate_pct','document_retrieval_time_p95_sec') ORDER BY 1

SELECT owner_team, metric_key, computed_status AS status, current_month_value, monthly_target, priority_action FROM v_kpi_owner_scoreboard_rag WHERE computed_status IN ('Amber', 'Red') ORDER BY CASE computed_status WHEN 'Red' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, owner_team
